objects.name: Analytic 1683
objects.description: Defender correlates an app escalating file visibility (permissions/flags, legacy storage modes) with enumeration of other apps’ storage or exported ContentProviders, followed by bulk reads/copies from target paths (including shared/external storage) and optional archive/encode then share/upload. Sequence: storage capability/permission gain → target discovery (provider queries, directory listing) → high-volume cross-app data reads from writable/shared paths → archive/encode → exfil/share within a short window.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Runtime grant or manifest presence for MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE/READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE/READ_MEDIA_*; legacy external storage mode detection

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: QUERY on exported ContentProviders of other packages (content://<other.pkg>/*) or MediaStore scoped queries immediately preceding file reads

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: READ or COPY operations where path matches external/shared locations of other apps (e.g., /storage/emulated/0/Android/data/<otherpkg>/files/, /storage/emulated/0/Download/<app>/*)

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: CREATE/WRITE of archive or container (.zip/.gz/.7z/.db copy) that aggregates files pulled from other-package paths

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window to tie discovery → reads → package → exfil (e.g., 15–120s).
Regex for cross-app paths on external/shared storage to monitor.
List of exported/weakly-protected content providers under scrutiny.
Lower bound on cumulative read volume to avoid noisy single-file accesses.
Known good CDNs/APIs to reduce false positives.
Foreground/background, Work Profile, developer mode to scope alerts.
